name: Mexican Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Make batter by mixing together the cornmeal, eggs, baking soda, bacon drippings, milk, and salt. Mix well.
2. Brown meat and drain off grease. Grease a 9 x 13-inch baking pan.
3. Add half of the batter to the pan and sprinkle with meat, onions, peppers, and cheese.
4. Cover with remaining batter. Cook at 350°F for about 45 minutes.
5. Serve hot.
